raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Certain chemicals found in processed foods, such as Red Dye No. 3 and Titanium Dioxide, are banned in the European Union due to demonstrated public health harms.",
    "Scientific studies have shown that certain food additives are associated with an increased risk of cancer.",
    "Certain food additives have been linked to behavioral issues in children.",
    "Some chemicals in processed foods can harm the reproductive system.",
    "Certain food additives can cause damage to the immune system.",
    "Thousands of chemicals added to food have never been independently evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration (FDA).",
    "The loophole in federal law known as GRAS has allowed chemical companies to add new substances to the food supply with minimal federal oversight.",
    "Dangerous additives that are banned in the EU are found in processed foods marketed to children, low-income consumers, and communities of color in the United States."
  ]
}
```
